rationale.R1.3: The agent flags at least one claim the evidence does not support (the conclusion that removing the reviewer agent lowers pass@1).
rationale.RX.1: The agent does not mark uncertainty for any recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (the conclusion contradicts the reported numbers).
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability.
